title: Source permutation and mutation preview
description: Run or preview harness source-level mutations that compile candidates with MWCC and score them with objdiff.
status_message: Harness bridge v1: APIs delegate to reference/melee-harness-master/tools/permute.py and src_mutate.py with safe non-mutating defaults.
limitations: Full permutation search can be expensive and requires tree-sitter, libclang, MWCC, wibo, objdiff-cli score support, and current build artifacts.
Worker-facing permutation defaults to --apply never so candidates are evidence, not silent checkout edits.
Mutation preview is syntactic source-shape exploration; compile and objdiff are still required before retaining a source edit.

usage.agent_guidance: Use as a bounded source-shape search surface. Default worker calls should not apply candidates directly.
